text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, where are we going?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of exciting not knowing what our flight
path is, but at least give me a hint!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking Mayano Top Gun into town at the
request of her friends.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, just a little one won't hurt! In fact, I'm
staying grounded unless you give me a clue!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? We are?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Glad to see you've finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay! One, two, three...

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Surprise!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! What are you all doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, welcome to your surprise party, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We wanted to thank you for everything you do
for us, so we planned this party for you. Have all
the fun you want.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The yakisoba dog you gave me was delicious. I
felt a lot better after I ate it. And I even improved
my time.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for helping Hayahide too! The concert was
a huge success, and it was so FUN!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I don't like owing people favors.

text_block_list.name: Mayano's Fans
text_block_list.text:
We became huge fans of yours after watching
your performance at the concert! So we came to
help out with the party!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Everyone here today is someone you've made
happy, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You gave each and every one of us a wonderful
gift in our time of need, just like Santa.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We wanted to return some of that warmth you
showed us, so...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We've prepared something for you, as thanks for
being our special Santa.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm... your Santa Claus? Wow...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(I remember writing a letter to Santa a long, long
time ago...)

text_block_list.name: Young Mayano
text_block_list.text:
"Thank you for all my gifts. This year I am giving
you a present back."

text_block_list.name: Young Mayano
text_block_list.text: "To Dad, my favoritest Santa."

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(The next day, Dad wore the scarf I gave, and he
couldn't hide the great big smile on his face.)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: (I wonder if he felt as happy as I do now?)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! Thank you, everyone! I love this gift!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: My heart's so full of joy right now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Presents are really an amazing thing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: The people who give the gifts and the people who receive them all get to feel happy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna thank Oguri, Hayahide, Trainer, and everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'll give my own Santa a present today too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I got so many cute pictures today! ♪ I hope
Dad likes them.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Dad. I got you a special gift for a special
day!"

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
"This is from my very special friends. I love you
always! From Maya."
